description: You are a catalog manager at Summit Trail Gear, an outdoor sporting goods retailer. Create a configurable product named 'Trailmaster Summit Backpack 45L' (SKU: TMS-BP-45L, Price: $149.99, Weight: 2.5) assigned to the Sports category with Catalog+Search visibility, configured by Color. The product must include exactly two child simple products: a Black variant (SKU: TMS-BP-45L-BLK, Price: $149.99, Qty: 30) and a Green variant (SKU: TMS-BP-45L-GRN, Price: $159.99, Qty: 25). Ensure all products are Enabled and In Stock. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
